options.name: -max
options.description: Specify whether to write out max. transition

options.name: -min
options.description: Specify whether to write out min. transition

options.name: -noPort
options.description: Skip write the transition values for the primary ports.

options.name: -view
options.description: View name for the output file.

options.name: -writeOutput
options.description: Also write the slews for output pins and output slew for bidir pins.
